title: Time tracking Desktop widget

posts.author: Siobhan (Siobhan)
posts.cookedHtml: Time tracking is great however its not very easy having to go into the board and item to time track. For employee compliance it would be really helpful to have a desktop widget that can easily be stopped and started in the bottom corner of your window. You could select you board and item from within the widget and it updates and saves the tracked time to the item. You could also have the time track countdown to help staff limit there time spent on a task and therefore estimate costs more effectively.
